creator: brian@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-bugs->imp

It looks like r207497 (committed by imp) causes some confusion. 

The 20100417 entry is at least out of order, but it also seems 
wrong as COMPAT_IA32 was removed... wasn't it? 

Anyway, assigning this to you Warner in the hope that you'll 
either remove the 20100417 entry or merge it with the 20100406 
entry. 

Incidentally, the FREEBDS typo was fixed by r208847...
